name: karpenter
description: Karpenter node autoscaling expert for EKS: NodePools, EC2NodeClasses, EKS Auto Mode NodeClasses, consolidation and disruption tuning, spot adoption, GPU pools, cost optimization, and node-level troubleshooting.

interface.shortDescription: Karpenter node autoscaling guidance for EKS
interface.longDescription: Use Karpenter to design, review, and troubleshoot node provisioning on EKS: NodePools, EC2NodeClasses, EKS Auto Mode NodeClasses, disruption tuning, spot adoption, GPU pools, and cost optimization.
defaultPrompt: Use Karpenter to review this NodePool for cost and availability risks.
Use Karpenter to design a spot-first node pool with on-demand fallback.
Use Karpenter to troubleshoot pods stuck Pending with no node launches.
